sentences.arabic: اسْتَمَعَ صَالِحٌ إِلَى دَرْسٍ دِينِيٍّ فِي الْمَسْجِدِ.
sentences.translation: Salih je slušao vjerski čas u džamiji.
sentences.translationEn: Salih listened to a religious lesson in the mosque.

sentences.translation: Šejh je govorio o iskrenosti i povjerljivosti.
sentences.translationEn: The Sheikh spoke about honesty and trustworthiness.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ صَالِحٌ بَعْضَ مَا قَالَهُ الشَّيْخُ فِي دَفْتَرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Salih je nešto od šejhovog govora zapisao u bilježnicu.
sentences.translationEn: Salih wrote some of what the Sheikh said in his notebook.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يُطَبِّقَ مَا تَعَلَّمَهُ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je primjeniti ono što je naučio u životu.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to apply what he learned in his life.
